main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'failure O-ring seal cap pressure vessel Tube 2 + feed water bypass' literal.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts (cracked FRP, damaged membrane OXID/MECH, permeate tube connector).

recommended_action.justification: Replace O-ring cap Tube 2 + EPDM + silicone grease + torque + reinstall — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide photo/inspection O-ring removed — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: leak persiste tras O-ring nuevo → FRP/permeate tube switch.
